note: Stage File Proxy exposes a config settings object, a request subscriber that fetches missing files on demand, a download-manager service, an excluded-paths event, and one Drush command. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) since they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 dev site using Stage File Proxy, which config setting names the production server files are fetched from, and where is the recommended place to set it? Give the config key.
evals.expected_output: Set the `origin` key (no trailing slash) on stage_file_proxy.settings, ideally in settings.php/settings.local.php, e.g. $config['stage_file_proxy.settings']['origin'] = 'https://example.com'; (module is dev-only).

evals.prompt: How do I make Stage File Proxy serve a 301 redirect to the production file instead of downloading and storing a local copy? Which setting and value?
evals.expected_output: Set hotlink = true on stage_file_proxy.settings; it serves a 301 to the origin file rather than saving a local copy (default false = download and cache locally).

evals.prompt: How does Stage File Proxy get a file that is missing from the local dev files directory when a page requests it?
evals.expected_output: A KernelEvents::REQUEST subscriber (StageFileProxySubscriber::checkFileOrigin, priority 240) intercepts requests under the public files path and, if the file is missing, downloads it from the origin via the download_manager service (or 301-redirects in hotlink mode).

evals.prompt: For image-style (/styles/) URLs, how do I make Stage File Proxy fetch the original image from production and let Drupal regenerate the derivative locally? Which setting?
evals.expected_output: Enable use_imagecache_root (default true): for /styles/ URLs it fetches the original file from the origin and lets the image module regenerate derivatives, speeding up later style requests.

evals.prompt: Which Drush command bulk-downloads all managed files from the origin to pre-warm a Stage File Proxy dev site, and how do I download just one file by id?
evals.expected_output: drush stage_file_proxy:dl (alias sfdl) downloads all missing managed files from the origin; use drush sfdl --fid=123 for a single file id.

evals.prompt: Is Stage File Proxy meant to be enabled on production, and how should I keep its settings out of the production environment?
evals.expected_output: No — it is for non-production (dev/staging) sites only; do not enable on production. Prefer setting config in settings.php/settings.local.php, and if using config sync keep it out of prod with Config Split.

evals.prompt: My production files live at a different path than my local site (multisite). Which Stage File Proxy setting points at the remote files directory, and what does it default to?
evals.expected_output: Set origin_dir to the remote public files path (e.g. sites/default/files); if empty it defaults to the local public files path.

evals.prompt: In custom code, how do I tell Stage File Proxy to never proxy certain request paths? Which event do I subscribe to?
evals.expected_output: Subscribe to the stage_file_proxy.alter_excluded_paths event and call $event->addExcludedPath('...') on the AlterExcludedPathsEvent; any request path containing an excluded string is skipped.
